name: polly-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for @fairfox/polly and its example consumers

scripts.test:all: bun run --filter @fairfox/polly test:all && bun run test:examples
scripts.test:examples: echo '\n=== Testing Examples ===' && bun run test:example:minimal && bun run test:example:todo-list && bun run test:example:full-featured
scripts.test:example:minimal: echo '\n--- Minimal Example ---' && bun run --cwd examples/minimal test:all
scripts.test:example:todo-list: echo '\n--- Todo List ---' && bun run --cwd examples/todo-list test:all
scripts.test:example:full-featured: echo '\n--- Full Featured ---' && bun run --cwd examples/full-featured test:all
